quotes.heading: About Palantir

quotes.text: Find out more about us—we think you’ll like what you see.
Where you take the next step in your career matters.
If you want to empower the world's most important institutions, you belong here.
At Palantir, we work for the common good—within our organization and within commercial and governmental institutions.
Palantir technology powers mission-critical, real-world decisions across industries, helping operators to prevent wildfires, distribute vaccines, staff nurses, improve road safety, and more.
Palantirians deliver mission-critical outcomes for the West's most important institutions.
Army now has in hand a few Tactical Intelligence Targeting Access Nodes, state-of-the-art trucks that promise to streamline the battlefield process of spotting, tracking and blasting.

quotes.text: We built Palantir to ensure the future of the West, not to tinker at the margins.
Tech culture has fallen into shallow consumerism, lacking a greater purpose.
Too few in Silicon Valley have asked what ought to be built — and why.
Palantirians have strong convictions and open minds.
quotes.heading: Free Thinkers
